title: Steve Rosenberg: Russia's economic forum overshadowed by drone attacks on St Petersburg
Ukraine Strikes St. Petersburg in Long-Range Drone Attack
text: It was the second such attack in days and came just hours after President Vladimir V. Putin spoke at an economic forum in the city.

title: Infant Killed as Israeli Military Fires on Car in West Bank, Palestinian Officials Say
text: Israel’s military said a soldier opened fire after Israeli troops “perceived a vehicle accelerating toward them.” The baby’s grandmother, who was in the car, disputed that account.
